name: trash-here-enterprise
description: Trash Here - AI-Powered Smart Waste Management Platform (Google Staff Engineer + Airbnb Design Quality)

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.db:validate: npm run db:generate --workspace=backend && npx prisma validate --schema=backend/prisma/schema.prisma

author: Senior Staff Software Engineer @ Google & Senior Product Designer @ Airbnb
